---
name: Data correction
about: A constant, assumption, or source is wrong or out of date
title: "[data] "
labels: data
---

**Which value** (file + key, e.g. `data/grid_fallback_factors.yaml` → `regions.EU`)

**Current value & its cited source**

**Proposed value & a better source** (URL / publication)

**Why it matters** (does it change a ranking / order of magnitude?)

> Reminder: value and citation must change together, in both the `data/*.yaml`
> file and `docs/methodology.md`. Uncertainty stays as `{min, max}` where applicable.
